required_gate: valid annotation, matrix scaffold or adapter evidence, but incomplete full TED design
event-supported tier plus >=3 effective blocks and block q <= 0.10 or CI excluding zero, with direction stability >=0.80
robust-event tier plus perturbation, lineage, multiome, matched-state or external directional support and negative-control margin > 0
primary_fields_checked: perturbation evidence; matched-state pass; negative-control margin

required_gate: matched functional rescue or intervention in the relevant system restores predicted axes and passes negative controls
public rescue/restoration-like contrast aligns with TED predicted rescue direction but is not the matched primary rescue
primary_fields_checked: public contrast map; axis reversal; control margin

required_gate: matched validation plus independent replication or orthogonal causal validation
